name: Mahilo
description: Ask your contacts from OpenClaw and get attributed answers with boundaries built in.

configSchema.title: Mahilo Plugin Config
configSchema.description: Plugin-local runtime configuration only. Mahilo server is the source of truth for identity, policy decisions, selector normalization, and callback secret lifecycle.

baseUrl.description: Optional Mahilo server base URL override. Defaults to the global Mahilo server at https://mahilo.io.

apiKey.description: Optional existing Mahilo API key. When present, the plugin auto-attaches a default sender on startup. `mahilo setup` can bootstrap and store one locally when this is omitted.

localPolicyLLM.description: Optional local policy LLM settings used by plugin-local policy evaluation. Inline apiKey is supported, but env-var fallback via apiKeyEnvVar remains the preferred non-inline path; authProfile is a hint for future host-managed credential reuse.

provider.description: Optional provider id override for local policy evaluation, for example `openai`.

model.description: Optional model override for local policy evaluation.

timeout.description: Request timeout in milliseconds for local policy LLM checks.

authProfile.description: Optional auth-profile hint for future host-managed provider credential lookup.

apiKeyEnvVar.description: Optional environment variable name that overrides the provider-default API key env var lookup.

apiKey.description: Optional inline provider API key for local policy evaluation.

callbackUrl.description: Optional public callback URL override. When omitted, the plugin auto-detects a callback URL from OpenClaw gateway remote/Tailscale settings and only falls back to localhost for local-only testing.

callbackPath.description: Optional callback path override (must start with '/') when callbackUrl auto-detection is used

inboundSessionKey.description: Fallback OpenClaw session key for inbound Mahilo messages when no exact originating thread can be resolved

inboundAgentId.description: Optional agent id to pair with inboundSessionKey when inbound Mahilo messages fall back to the default session

reviewMode.description: Optional local UX behavior for ask outcomes; this does not change server policy truth

promptContextEnabled.description: Enable native before_prompt_build Mahilo context injection
